CustomField.description: AI-generated explanation of why this comment was flagged as a potential Vermont Yankee issue exhaustion comment. Should identify: the specific legal or technical standard cited, the specific inadequacy alleged, and why this rises to the level of a legally specific objection rather than a general substantive concern. Written by the NEPA_Comment_Triage Agent alongside the flag.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI explanation of the litigation threat: what legal/technical standard was cited, what inadequacy was alleged, and why this may set up a future APA challenge.
CustomField.label: Litigation Threat Basis
